title: Lysa Akin
compiled_truth: Lysa Akin is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-06 to 2001-07-31), Lysa Akin sent 119 and received 508 emails, totalling 627 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (31), [Mary Hain](people/mary-hain) (27), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (23), [Joseph Alamo](people/joseph-alamo) (21), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (20).
